basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 13 Radiotherapy Technician Grade, Perfusionist and More posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur)
basic_details.post_name: Radiographic Technician Grade-I, Radiotherapy Technician Grade II, Perfusionist
basic_details.short_information: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur) has officially announced the Radiographic Technician Grade I, Radiotherapy Technician Grade II & Perfusionist Recruitment 2026 with 13 openings. Candidates aged 21 to 35 years who hold a B.Sc. (Hons.) in Radiography/ Radiotherapy/ Radiology, a Diploma in Radiography/ Radiotherapy/ Radiology with relevant experience, or a B.Sc. degree with a Certificate in Perfusion Technology can submit their online applications on or before 28-07-2026. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years, PwBD: 10 years, PwBD+OBC: 13 years, PwBD+SC/ST: 15 years, Central/State Govt/Autonomous employees: 5 years, Ex-Servicemen: as per rules

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. (Hons) in Radiography/Radiotherapy/Radiology, Diploma in Radiography/Radiotherapy/Radiology with experience, B.Sc. Degree with Certificate in Perfusion Technology
qualification.details: Radiographic Technician Grade-I: B.Sc. (Hons) (3 years course) in Radiography from a recognized University/Institution OR Diploma in Radiography from a recognized institution with 2 years' experience. Desired: Ability to use computers - Hands on experience in office applications, spread sheets and presentations. Radiotherapy Technician Grade II: B.Sc. (Hons) (3 years course) in Radiotherapy/Radiology from a recognized University/Institution OR Diploma in Radiotherapy/Radiology from a recognized institution with 2 years' experience. Desired: Ability to use computers - Hands on experience in office applications, spread sheets and presentations. Perfusionist: B.Sc. Degree from a recognized University AND Certificate in Perfusion Technology (awarded by recognized Institution/Association/Authority such as Association of Thoracic and Cardio Vascular Surgeons of India) after training in a centre with at least one-year experience in Clinical Perfusion. Desirable: Working experience in Clinical Perfusion.

salary_details.details: Rs. 55,932/- Per month (Consolidated) for all posts.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Jodhpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 21 days from the opening date (28-07-2026)
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Jodhpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Jodhpur Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Jodhpur Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Radiographic Technician Grade-I: B.Sc. (Hons) (3 years course) in Radiography from a recognized University/Institution OR Diploma in Radiography from a recognized institution with 2 years' experience. Desired: Ability to use computers - Hands on experience in office applications, spread sheets and presentations. Radiotherapy Technician Grade II: B.Sc. (Hons) (3 years course) in Radiotherapy/Radiology from a recognized University/Institution OR Diploma in Radiotherapy/Radiology from a recognized institution with 2 years' experience. Desired: Ability to use computers - Hands on experience in office applications, spread sheets and presentations. Perfusionist: B.Sc. Degree from a recognized University AND Certificate in Perfusion Technology (awarded by recognized Institution/Association/Authority such as Association of Thoracic and Cardio Vascular Surgeons of India) after training in a centre with at least one-year experience in Clinical Perfusion. Desirable: Working experience in Clinical Perfusion.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC: 3 years, PwBD: 10 years, PwBD+OBC: 13 years, PwBD+SC/ST: 15 years, Central/State Govt/Autonomous employees: 5 years, Ex-Servicemen: as per rules

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 55,932/- Per month (Consolidated) for all posts.

rows.event: Last Date of Submission of Application
rows.date: 21 days from the opening date (28 July 2026)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Jodhpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 21 days from the opening date (28-07-2026) To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Jodhpur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 is 28th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Radiotherapy Technician Grade II post?
faq.answer: There are 11 vacancies available for the Radiotherapy Technician Grade II post as per the official notification released by AIIMS Jodhpur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum age requirement for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all the posts advertised by AIIMS Jodhpur is 21 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Perfusionist post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Perfusionist post, as well as other advertised positions, is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST candidates applying for the AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026. The fee is Nil for these categories.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these government jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process for the AIIMS Jodhpur Recruitment 2026 typically involves a Screening Test followed by a Skill Test.

faq.question: Q7. What is the consolidated salary offered for these contract positions?
faq.answer: Candidates selected for these contract positions will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 55,932/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. What are the educational qualifications required for Radiographic Technician Grade-I?
faq.answer: For Radiographic Technician Grade-I, candidates need a B.Sc. (Hons) in Radiography or a Diploma in Radiography with 2 years of experience.

faq.question: Q9. Does AIIMS Jodhpur offer age relaxation for any categories?
faq.answer: Yes, AIIMS Jodhpur offers age relaxation for categories like SC/ST (5 years), OBC (3 years), and PwBD (10 years), among others, as per government rules.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the AIIMS Jodhpur website or accessed via the 'Official Notification PDF' link provided in the Important Links section of this article.
